description: Research three occupations on the Bureau of Labor Statistics Occupational Outlook Handbook (https://www.bls.gov/ooh/): Registered Nurses, Software Developers, and Electricians. Create a Firefox bookmark folder named 'Career Research' containing at least one BLS page for each occupation. Extract the Median Annual Wage, Job Outlook (%), Typical Entry-Level Education, and Number of Jobs for each. Save this data to ~/Documents/career_comparison.json using keys 'registered_nurses', 'software_developers', and 'electricians', with fields 'median_annual_wage' (integer), 'job_outlook_percent' (number), 'typical_education' (string), and 'num_jobs' (integer). Additionally, write a brief plain-text summary comparing the three careers for a student at ~/Documents/career_summary.txt.
